message:
Update parity report artifacts with mixed_dtype results (457/457 pass)

All 23 mixed_dtype cases pass with exact match. Per-primitive counts
updated for Add2, LaxDiv, LaxEq, LaxGt, LaxLt, LaxMax, LaxMin,
LaxMul, LaxNe, LaxSub. Overall pass rate remains 100% across all
457 conformance cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
